qa_pairs.question: What is one key advantage of the META package over GLOST for handling failed computations?
qa_pairs.answer: The META package offers automated resubmission of cases that failed or never ran, a feature not supported by GLOST and similar packages, and it is very easy to use.

qa_pairs.question: When was the webinar describing the META package recorded?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar describing the META package was recorded on October 6th, 2021.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the webinar about the META package?
qa_pairs.answer: You can view the webinar about the META package here: [https://youtu.be/GcYbaPClwGE].

qa_pairs.question: What is recommended for users who want to start using META quickly?
qa_pairs.answer: If you are impatient to start using META, you can follow the steps listed in the 'Quick start' section. However, it is highly recommended to also read the rest of the page.
